chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1415 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on statement 15.01.2019 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G...... Learned Counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and to that effect he has filed statement dated 07.01.2019. In the light of statement, this petition stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
